hero.title: Magshimim
hero.subtitle: A community for alumni of "Magshimim", the Israeli Cyber Education Center's program.

target.heading: Our
target.description: At Magshimim Next, our mission is to build a supportive community for graduates of the Magshimim program, helping them navigate everyday challenges, especially in areas like work, career development, and education.

magshimim.heading: Magshimim
magshimim.description: Launched in 2010, Magshimim was designated as the National Cyber Program, and operates across Israel's social and geographic periphery, encouraging driven young people to pursue advanced studies in computer science and cybersecurity.

community.heading: The Community
community.description: Magshimim Next is made up of individuals from across Israel, representing a wide range of backgrounds and experiences, including soldiers and veterans of technological units, startup founders, academic professionals, and top-tier developers and researchers.

stats.heading: Community Statistics
stats.description: Magshimim Next is a vibrant and active community. From engaging with and celebrating our members, to hosting events and workshops, we are always looking for new ways to connect, support, and grow together.

members.heading: Our Members
members.description: Our community is made up of exceptional individuals who are leading the way in tech, cybersecurity, and innovation. From senior engineers at top companies to successful startup founders, our members are shaping the future of technology.

support.heading: Support Our Community
support.description: Help us continue building and supporting the next generation of tech leaders. Your contribution enables us to host more events, provide mentorship programs, and create opportunities for our members.
support.donation_text: Every donation, big or small, helps us empower Magshimim alumni to reach their full potential in the tech industry.
support.donation_footer: Thank you for supporting our community!
